---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement, feature, or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

Summary
-------
- A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

Motivation
----------
- Why is this feature important? Who will benefit?

Proposed solution
-----------------
- Describe the proposed implementation at a high level and any API changes.

Alternatives considered
-----------------------
- Other approaches you considered and why they were not chosen.

Risks and mitigations
---------------------
- Security, performance, or compatibility concerns and how to mitigate them.

Acceptance criteria
-------------------
- Concrete conditions under which this feature would be considered complete (tests, performance targets, docs updated).
